name: Tech Founder Cold Outreach
description: Beachhead profile for cold email campaigns targeting technical founders. High minimum score ensures only well-qualified leads get drafted. One contact per lead, founder voice, short punchy email.

outreach.tone: Direct, founder-to-founder, concise. No buzzwords. Show genuine insight about their product.
outreach.templateNotes: Lead with a specific observation about their company. One clear ask in the CTA.
